notes: Big reliability pass from a full app review. Day completions, exam sections, and teach-back scores can no longer be lost when leaving a screen quickly; double-taps can't skip lesson steps or grade the wrong flashcard; the back button now exits a lesson/quiz/exam step instead of closing the app; the keyboard no longer covers the chat and lesson answer boxes; and many small fixes for small screens, large font sizes, and after-midnight sessions.
